assumptions: Engineer-verified lumen-method illuminance for reception lobby; placement deferred to drafting-package stage per calc_only mode.

rationale.chat_summary: Reception lobby with north glazing — 2 zones (perimeter Z1 daylight-controlled, interior Z2 always on). Target 300 lx achieved at 318 lx maintained. Part L 2021 perimeter daylight-linking applied. Reply to refine, e.g. 'use linear pendants in the interior'.

sections.title: Illumination
sections.summary: Target 300 lx (lobby, BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.3); 318 lx achieved.

decisions.label: Lux target 300 lx
decisions.summary: BS EN 12464-1 sets 300 lx for entrance lobbies.
decisions.rule: BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 entry for lobby

sections.title: Layout
sections.summary: Two-zone split (Z1 perimeter 2 m from north glazing, Z2 interior) to enable independent daylight-linked control.

sections.title: Circuits
sections.summary: Two circuits L1-Z1 (perimeter) and L1-Z2 (interior) so the daylight-linking dims the perimeter without affecting the interior.

sections.title: Part L controls
sections.summary: UK new-build path. Daylight-linked dimming applied on Z1; occupancy not required for lobby.

decisions.label: Daylight-linked dimming on perimeter zone (Z1)
decisions.summary: Part L 2021 § 5 requires daylight-linked control where glazing borders the perimeter zone.

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.summary: Standard reflectance set assumed (0.7/0.5/0.2) — confirm during interior design coordination.

decisions.label: Reflectances 0.7/0.5/0.2
decisions.summary: Standard ceiling/wall/floor reflectance assumed for a clean lobby.

calc_only_reason: Calc-only demonstration: illuminance target (200 lx reception per BS EN 12464-1) verified achievable with the calculated luminaire count; full placement layout deferred to drafting-package stage. Marked explicit calc_only post-Sprint-D reviewer follow-up — prior _note workaround removed; placement authoring queued.
